IMAGE 1:
URL: https://breeam.com/documents/d/bre-group/nova-building-2-jpg
DESCRIPTION: A modern building with large glass windows reflecting a blue sky with clouds, featuring wooden support beams and an outdoor seating area with a picnic table, indicative of a BREEAM certified project.

IMAGE 2:
URL: https://breeamassessment.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/Case-Studies-and-Insights-from-Real-Residential-Projects.webp
DESCRIPTION: Two young individuals are standing at a wooden countertop, examining potted plants and gardening supplies in a bright, plant-filled room.

IMAGE 3:
URL: https://breeam.com/documents/705086/705197/Expo-2020-Dubai-Expo-ban.jpg/8c934582-74a6-ae95-34c0-15174cd64f36?t=1705130448577
DESCRIPTION: The image shows a modern, environmentally sustainable building with BREEAM certification, featuring lush greenery, trees integrated into the architecture, and innovative facade designs with perforated panels and glass elements, highlighting eco-friendly design and sustainable urban development.

IMAGE 4:
URL: https://image.slidesharecdn.com/breeampresentation-211101150326/85/Breeam-presentation-6-320.jpg
DESCRIPTION: The image displays a step-by-step guide titled "How do I get a BREEAM rating?" with green and white text boxes outlining the process from deciding to receiving certification, including steps like applying, registering, carrying out assessments, collating information, reviewing, submitting, and receiving the rating.

IMAGE 5:
URL: https://breeam.com/documents/311572/1758907/building-from-the-top.jpg
DESCRIPTION: The image shows an aerial view of a building with a large number of solar panels installed on its white roof, surrounded by parking spaces, trees, and adjacent structures, indicating a focus on sustainable energy and a BREEAM certified project.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

enriched_points.expanded_content: The BREEAM certified project aimed to integrate sustainable design principles, enhancing energy efficiency and environmental performance while meeting community needs and regulatory standards.
Achieving an overall score of 74.4%, the project received an Excellent BREEAM rating, demonstrating its strong commitment to sustainability and efficient resource management.
Innovative features included solar panels, rainwater harvesting systems, and green roofs, contributing to reduced carbon footprint and improved biodiversity within the urban setting.
The project encountered challenges such as budget constraints and regulatory hurdles, which required creative solutions and stakeholder collaboration to maintain sustainability goals.
The success of this BREEAM certified project sets a benchmark for future developments, promoting awareness of sustainable practices and influencing policy changes in building regulations.
